name: Harford Radon & Real Estate Repair Services
description: Family-owned business providing professional unbiased mold inspections and testing with NEHA certified professionals.

name: Pillar To Post
description: Home inspection leader offering accurate mold testing using innovative technology for buyers and sellers.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Probably the most thorough and comprehensive home inspection I have ever seen.
Very professional, responsive and easy to work with. I felt comfortable moving forward.
Steve was great please give him a raise and a promotion.
Everything was explained and all questions were answered without hesitation.

sentiment.summary: Pillar To Post receives overwhelmingly positive sentiment with reviewers consistently praising their thorough, professional inspections and responsive customer service across multiple locations.
